sprint: Gateway Skip Hint Copy — 'Tap to Continue' to 'Tap to Skip'
task: Direct copy fix: the Gateway's own tap hint (js/gatewaySequence.js's showTapHint(), shown after TAP_HINT_DELAY_MS) read '✦ tap to continue ✦', but tapping it actually skips the whole cinematic sequence outright (onSkipClick) rather than advancing one step -- 'continue' undersold what the action does. Changed to '✦ tap to skip ✦'. Confirmed the codebase's only other 'Tap to continue' string (js/magicCardUI.js's Creator Ceremony reveal-stage button) is a different feature -- not touched, since it wasn't part of what was being discussed. Verified via node --check and both goldenBuild.js suites (World Builder v1 and v2) unchanged.
